requirements.task_name: Plan a Sunday visit with a 9–11am service that has a children’s program for ages 5–10
requirements.task_description: Find a Sunday worship service that starts between 9:00 and 11:00 am and offers a children’s program for ages 5–10, then add both the main service and the matching children’s program to a visit plan.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest free weekday class starting after 5:00pm this month
requirements.task_description: Find a free class or workshop held on a weekday this month that starts after 5:00pm, choose the earliest available date, and complete the registration form for 2 attendees.

requirements.task_name: Request a room reservation for 8–12 people on an upcoming Wednesday from 7–9pm
requirements.task_description: Find an available room with capacity between 8 and 12 people for the next Wednesday evening from 7:00pm to 9:00pm and submit a reservation request for a small group meeting.

requirements.task_name: Save 3 recent sermons about forgiveness to a watch-later playlist
requirements.task_description: Search for sermons on the topic of forgiveness from the last 6 months, sort them by newest first, and add the 3 most recent sermons to a watch-later playlist.

requirements.task_name: Sign up for a Saturday volunteer role requiring less than 3 hours per week
requirements.task_description: Find a volunteer opportunity that takes place on Saturdays and lists a weekly time commitment under 3 hours, choose the first qualifying role, and submit a volunteer interest form for that role.

requirements.task_name: Submit a $25 one-time pledge to the Youth Ministry fund
requirements.task_description: Use the giving page to create a one-time pledge of exactly $25 designated to the Youth Ministry fund, choosing a pledge (no immediate payment) option and completing the pledge form.

requirements.task_name: Add 2 non-overlapping community events in the same week to a personal events list
requirements.task_description: Find two community events occurring in the same week (Monday–Sunday) whose times do not overlap and add both to a personal “My Events” or favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Request a morning pastoral counseling appointment next week with a pastor specializing in marriage
requirements.task_description: Find a pastor whose profile mentions marriage counseling, select an available counseling slot next week between 9:00am and 12:00pm, and submit an appointment request form.
